import json, pathlib, pprint, re, unicodedata, difflib, math, itertools, collections, statistics, os, sys, textwrap
import json, glob, os, re, unicodedata, difflib, math

qpath="/mnt/data/file-RhatJL6W5hpishQfBLfQ2a-quranic_verses.json"
hpath="/mnt/data/file-GKgoPWB6fR896BnuZfjrBZ-six_hadith_books.json"
import json, io
with open(qpath,'r',encoding='utf-8') as f:
    quran=json.load(f)
len(quran), type(quran)

def normalize(s):
    # remove diacritics and tatweel and punctuation-ish, normalize hamza
    s = ''.join(ch for ch in s if ch not in '\u0640')  # remove tatweel
    # unify various forms of alef and hamza to bare alif
    s = s.replace('أ','ا').replace('إ','ا').replace('آ','ا').replace('ٱ','ا')
    s = s.replace('ى','ي').replace('ؤ','و').replace('ئ','ي').replace('ٰ','')
    # remove tashkeel
    tashkeel = ''.join(chr(c) for c in range(0x0610,0x061A+1)) + ''.join(chr(c) for c in range(0x064B,0x065F+1)) + ''.join(chr(c) for c in range(0x0670,0x0670+1))
    s = ''.join(ch for ch in s if ch not in tashkeel)
    # remove punctuation
    s = re.sub(r'[^\w\s\u0600-\u06FF]+',' ', s)
    s = re.sub(r'\s+',' ', s).strip()
    return s

target = "وَلَقَدْ أَرْسَلْنَا نُوحًا إِلَى قَوْمِهِ فَقَالَ يَا قَوْمِ اعْبُدُوا اللَّهَ مَا لَكُم مِنْ عَبْدٍ بِاللَّهِ يُطِعُكُمْ إِن كُنتُمْ تُدِينُونَ"
norm_target = normalize(target)
norm_target[:120], len(norm_target)

# search quran for ayat containing overlapping tokens
def score_verse(txt):
    n = normalize(txt)
    # compute overlap
    tset = set(norm_target.split())
    nset = set(n.split())
    inter = tset & nset
    return len(inter), len(inter)/max(1,len(tset)), n

cands = []
for v in quran:
    interlen, ratio, n = score_verse(v['ayah_text'])
    if interlen>=4:
        cands.append((interlen, ratio, v))
cands_sorted=sorted(cands, key=lambda x:(x[0],x[1]), reverse=True)
len(cands_sorted), cands_sorted[:10]

# find all ayat in Surah Hud around 25
[val for val in quran if val['surah_name']=='هود' and 20<=val['ayah_id']<=30]
